name: Intertrade Co.,Ltd.
summary: Intertrade Co.,Ltd. provides financial, business, and healthcare solutions in Japan. The company offers securities dealing, foreign exchange margin trading, and exchange trading systems; and business management integration platform, virtual engineering service, and system engineering dispatch solutions. It also plans and sells health food and cosmetics; and produces functional mushroom. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
